title: HARM REDUCTION - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE MARION COUNTY HARM REDUCTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers harm reduction supplies such as sharps containers, drug test strips, and safe use supplies. Safe use supplies may include tourniquets and cookers. Other supplies offered include hygiene kits, wound care kits, safe smoking kits, and condoms with and without latex. Availability of all items may vary based on supply stock. 3855 Wolverine Street NE Suite 6 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 3pm-7pm Temporary location: Tuesday 3pm-7pm at Great Circle Recovery 1011 Commercial Street NE, Suite 110, Salem, OR 97301 Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, clients are encouraged to visit Great Circle Recovery location due to limited space FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Harm Reduction Test Strip Distribution Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Opioid Antidote Distribution Safe Sex Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV+ CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ALLIANCE FOR COMMUNITY WELLNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIV ALLIANCE MARION COUNTY
